<script>
  document.addEventListener('contextmenu', e => { if(e.target.tagName==='IMG') e.preventDefault(); });
  document.addEventListener('dragstart', e => { if(e.target.tagName==='IMG') e.preventDefault(); });
  const nav = document.getElementById('main-nav');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => { nav.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 60); });
  const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
    entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) { e.target.classList.add('visible'); obs.unobserve(e.target); } });
  }, {threshold:0.07, rootMargin:'0px 0px -30px 0px'});
  document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => obs.observe(el));
  function showGalleryPage(type, btn) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-page').forEach(p => p.style.display='none');
    const page = document.getElementById('gallery-page-'+type);
    if(page) { page.style.display='block'; if(type==='drv') loadGalleryImages(); }
    document.querySelectorAll('.gnav-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
  }
  function openGallery(type, btn) {
    document.getElementById('gallery-landing').style.display = 'none';
    document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-page').forEach(p => p.style.display='none');
    const page = document.getElementById('gallery-page-'+type);
    if(page) { page.style.display='block'; if(type==='drv') loadGalleryImages(); }
    // Scroll to gallery section top
    document.getElementById('gallery').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'});
  }
  function closeGallery() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.gallery-page').forEach(p => p.style.display='none');
    document.getElementById('gallery-landing').style.display='block';
    document.getElementById('gallery').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'start'});
  }

  function submitApply() {
    const btn = document.querySelector('.apply-btn');
    btn.textContent = 'Sending…';
    btn.disabled = true;
    setTimeout(() => {
      btn.textContent = 'Registration received ✓';
      btn.style.background = 'var(--teal-vivid)';
    }, 800);
  }
</script>

<!-- ABOUT — compact, face visible on load -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="about-photo-col">
    <img src="images/infinity.jpg" alt="Dr. Irina Valentin">
  </div>
  <div class="about-text-col">
    <p class="label">About</p>
    <h2 class="title">Dr. Irina Valentin</h2>
    <p class="about-sub">Ph.D., C.Psych., SCA · Neuropsychologist &amp; Artist · Toronto, Canada</p>
    <div class="about-quote"><p>"I did not create this methodology. I documented a transformation — and then made it repeatable."</p></div>
    <p>Irina Valentin is a registered clinical neuropsychologist and the developer of the Art of Emotions method. The method emerged from her own documented process of nervous system transformation, during which she mapped successive phases through symbolic painting and later systematized the developmental arc into a structured and repeatable framework.</p>
    <p>With advanced training in both computer engineering and clinical psychology, her theoretical work integrates insights from polyvagal theory, predictive processing, semiotic mediation, and depth psychology. During the ongoing war in Ukraine, she has trained more than 400 mental health professionals through partnerships with Ukrainian universities.</p>
    <p>Art of Emotions is her original intellectual property, developed independently and offered to professionals and individuals through the KINERGIA International Institute of Resilience and Human Development.</p>
    <p>The Art of Emotions training program prepares professionals to apply this method responsibly in psychological, educational, and developmental contexts.</p>
    <div class="credentials">
      <span class="cred-tag">Ph.D. Psychology</span><span class="cred-tag">C.Psych.</span><span class="cred-tag">SCA</span>
      <span class="cred-tag">MSc Engineering</span><span class="cred-tag">Neuropsychologist</span><span class="cred-tag">KINERGIA Founder</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Gallery images — loaded on demand to keep page fast -->
<script id="gallery-image-data">
const GALLERY_IMGS = {
  "seen":       "obscurity.jpg",
  "spring":     "opening.jpg",
  "cocoon":     "cocooning.jpg",
  "infinity":   "infinity.jpg",
  "jackbean":   "growing.jpg",
  "death":      "death-of-ego.jpg",
  "choice":     "choice.jpg",
  "connection": "connection.jpg",
  "polarity":   "polarity.jpg",
  "surf":       "alignment.jpg",
  "tara":       "tara.jpg",
  "gratitude":  "integration.jpg",
  "priest":     "priesthood.jpg",
  "bending2":   "bending-reality.jpg",
  "guardian":   "guardian.jpg",
  "balancing":  "equilibrium.jpg",
  "sparrow2":   "sparrow-and-phoenix.jpg",
  "ancestry2":  "lineage.jpg"
};

function loadGalleryImages() {
  const imgs = document.querySelectorAll('img[data-src]');
  imgs.forEach(img => {
    const key = img.getAttribute('data-src').replace('gallery-img-', '');
    if (GALLERY_IMGS[key]) {
      img.src = GALLERY_IMGS[key];
      img.removeAttribute('data-src');
    }
  });
}
</script>
